content: Tactically constructive on Japanese equities supported by improving corporate governance and ongoing wage-price normalization. The BOJ remains on a measured holding stance, supporting the carry-positive risk-on backdrop. Overweight banks (curve steepening) and trading companies (capital allocation reforms); underweight legacy electronics on demand softness. The TOPIX rotation favors quality and profitability tilts. Domestic real-estate names benefit from secular reflationary trends. USD/JPY range-bound 148-152, consistent with risk-on tone. Overall positioning constructive, favourable to small-caps and reflation beneficiaries.
